title: scolymus grandiflorus
intro: Scolymus grandiflorus, also known as artichoke thistle or cardoon, is a perennial thistle plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its edible and medicinal properties. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its rich source of inulin, which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and has been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, diabetes, and cardiovascular disease. The health benefits of Scolymus grandiflorus include reducing cholesterol levels, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders and promote overall well-being.
